title: The Witch: Part 1. The Subversion
posterAlt: The Witch: Part 1. The Subversion (2018) movie poster
tmdbOverview: Ja-yoon is a high school student who struggles with memory loss after she endured some unknown trauma during her childhood. While trying to uncover the truth, she is unwittingly dragged into a world of crime and finds herself on a journey that will awaken many secrets hidden deep within.
synopsis: Released in 2018, The Witch: Part 1. The Subversion is a action and science fiction film from South Korea. It holds a solid 7.2 rating on IMDb. It appears on several of our curated Top 10 lists. It carries a R certification (CA rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
